note: This EPD uses a non-standard module structure (Upstream/Core/Downstream) rather than EN 15804 A1-A3/A4/etc. There is no explicit A1-A3 column. The production stage (closest to A1-A3) was estimated by summing the Upstream module (raw material extraction + chemical blending supply) and Core module (transport to plant, blending, packaging); the Downstream module (distribution, use-phase dilution, EoL) was excluded. Values: GWP-fossil Upstream 3.01 + Core 0.0804 = 3.09; GWP-biogenic -1.48E-3 + -8.09E-6 = -1.488E-3; GWP-total 3.01 + 0.0805 = 3.09; GWP-GHG 1.43 + 0.0706 = 1.50. This module-to-stage mapping is an assumption, hence low confidence. Full cradle-to-grave TOTALs are: GWP-fossil 3.31, GWP-biogenic -1.56E-3, GWP-total 3.31, GWP-GHG 1.66.
